namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\Project;
use App\Models\Category;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

class ProjectController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        $projects = Project::with('category')->orderBy('sort_order')->latest()->paginate(10);
        return view('admin.projects.index', compact('projects'));
    }

    public function create()
    {
        $categories = Category::orderBy('name')->get();
        return view('admin.projects.create', compact('categories'));
    }

    public function store(Request $request)
    {
        if ($request->input('project_url') === '#') {
            $request->merge(['project_url' => null]);
        }

        $validated = $request->validate([
            'title' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'category_id' => ['required', 'exists:categories,id'],
            'description' => ['required', 'string'],
            'image_path' => ['nullable', 'image', 'max:2048'],
            'project_url' => ['nullable', 'url'],
            'is_featured' => ['boolean'],
            'sort_order' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
        ]);

        if ($request->hasFile('image_path')) {
            $validated['image_path'] = $request->file('image_path')->store('projects', 'public');
        }

        $validated['slug'] = Str::slug($validated['title']);
        $validated['is_featured'] = $request->boolean('is_featured');
        $validated['sort_order'] = $validated['sort_order'] ?? 0;

        Project::create($validated);

        return redirect()->route('admin.projects.index')->with('success', 'Project created successfully.');
    }

    public function edit(Project $project)
    {
        $categories = Category::orderBy('name')->get();
        return view('admin.projects.edit', compact('project', 'categories'));
    }

    public function update(Request $request, Project $project)
    {
        if ($request->input('project_url') === '#') {
            $request->merge(['project_url' => null]);
        }

        $validated = $request->validate([
            'title' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'category_id' => ['required', 'exists:categories,id'],
            'description' => ['required', 'string'],
            'image_path' => ['nullable', 'image', 'max:2048'],
            'project_url' => ['nullable', 'url'],
            'is_featured' => ['boolean'],
            'sort_order' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
        ]);

        if ($request->hasFile('image_path')) {
            $validated['image_path'] = $request->file('image_path')->store('projects', 'public');
        }

        $validated['slug'] = Str::slug($validated['title']);
        $validated['is_featured'] = $request->boolean('is_featured');
        $validated['sort_order'] = $validated['sort_order'] ?? 0;

        $project->update($validated);

        return redirect()->route('admin.projects.index')->with('success', 'Project updated successfully.');
    }

    public function destroy(Project $project)
    {
        $project->delete();
        return redirect()->route('admin.projects.index')->with('success', 'Project deleted successfully.');
    }
}

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\Setting;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;

class SettingController extends Controller
{
    public function edit()
    {
        $settings = Setting::allSettings();
        return view('admin.settings.edit', compact('settings'));
    }

    public function update(Request $request)
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'site_name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'hero_title' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'hero_subtitle' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'typing_words' => ['required', 'string'],
            'about_bio' => ['required', 'string'],
            'current_role' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'location' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'email' => ['required', 'email'],
            'phone' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'whatsapp' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'github_url' => ['nullable', 'url'],
            'linkedin_url' => ['nullable', 'url'],
            'hero_avatar' => ['nullable', 'image', 'max:2048'],
            'cv_path' => ['nullable', 'file', 'max:5120', 'mimes:pdf,doc,docx'],
            'stat_projects' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
            'stat_clients' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
            'stat_experience' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
            'stat_technologies' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
        ]);

        // Process typing words into JSON
        $words = array_filter(array_map('trim', explode(',', $validated['typing_words'])));
        Setting::set('typing_words', json_encode($words));

        // Save text settings
        $textKeys = [
            'site_name', 'hero_title', 'hero_subtitle', 'about_bio',
            'current_role', 'location', 'email', 'phone', 'whatsapp',
            'github_url', 'linkedin_url',
            'stat_projects', 'stat_clients', 'stat_experience', 'stat_technologies',
        ];

        foreach ($textKeys as $key) {
            Setting::set($key, $validated[$key] ?? null);
        }

        // Handle avatar upload
        if ($request->hasFile('hero_avatar')) {
            Setting::set('hero_avatar', $request->file('hero_avatar')->store('avatars', 'public'));
        }

        // Handle CV upload
        if ($request->hasFile('cv_path')) {
            Setting::set('cv_path', $request->file('cv_path')->store('cv', 'public'));
        }

        return redirect()->route('admin.settings.edit')->with('success', 'Settings updated successfully.');
    }
}

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\ContactMessage;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;

class ContactMessageController extends Controller
{
    public function index(Request $request)
    {
        $query = ContactMessage::latest();

        if ($request->has('filter') && $request->filter === 'unread') {
            $query->unread();
        }

        $messages = $query->paginate(10);
        return view('admin.messages.index', compact('messages'));
    }

    public function show(ContactMessage $message)
    {
        if (!$message->is_read) {
            $message->update(['is_read' => true]);
        }

        return view('admin.messages.show', compact('message'));
    }

    public function markRead(ContactMessage $message)
    {
        $message->update(['is_read' => true]);
        return back()->with('success', 'Message marked as read.');
    }

    public function destroy(ContactMessage $message)
    {
        $message->delete();
        return redirect()->route('admin.messages.index')->with('success', 'Message deleted successfully.');
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;

class AdminAuthController extends Controller
{
    public function showLogin()
    {
        if (Auth::check()) {
            return redirect()->route('admin.dashboard');
        }

        return view('admin.login');
    }

    public function login(Request $request)
    {
        $credentials = $request->validate([
            'email' => ['required', 'email'],
            'password' => ['required'],
        ]);

        if (Auth::attempt($credentials, $request->boolean('remember'))) {
            $request->session()->regenerate();
            return redirect()->intended(route('admin.dashboard'));
        }

        return back()->withErrors([
            'email' => 'The provided credentials do not match our records.',
        ])->onlyInput('email');
    }

    public function logout(Request $request)
    {
        Auth::logout();
        $request->session()->invalidate();
        $request->session()->regenerateToken();
        return redirect()->route('admin.login');
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Cache;

class Setting extends Model
{
    protected $fillable = ['key', 'value'];

    protected static function boot(): void
    {
        parent::boot();

        static::saved(function () {
            Cache::forget('app_settings');
        });

        static::deleted(function () {
            Cache::forget('app_settings');
        });
    }

    public static function get(string $key, $default = null)
    {
        $settings = self::all();

        $setting = $settings->firstWhere('key', $key);

        return $setting?->value ?? $default;
    }

    public static function set(string $key, $value): void
    {
        self::updateOrCreate(
            ['key' => $key],
            ['value' => $value]
        );
    }

    public static function allSettings(): array
    {
        return Cache::rememberForever('app_settings', function () {
            return self::pluck('value', 'key')->toArray();
        });
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;

class ContactMessage extends Model
{
    protected $fillable = ['name', 'email', 'subject', 'message', 'is_read'];

    protected $casts = [
        'is_read' => 'boolean',
    ];

    public function scopeUnread($query)
    {
        return $query->where('is_read', false);
    }
}

## Admin Panel Capabilities — Complete Report

### Routes (confirmed from `routes/web.php`)

All admin routes live under the `/admin` prefix, protected by `auth` middleware, and use the `admin.` route name prefix.

| Route | Controller@method | Name |
|---|---|---|
| GET `/admin/login` | AdminAuthController@showLogin | admin.login |
| POST `/admin/login` | AdminAuthController@login | — |
| POST `/admin/logout` | AdminAuthController@logout | admin.logout |
| GET `/admin` | DashboardController@index | admin.dashboard |
| GET `/admin/projects` | ProjectController@index | admin.projects.index |
| GET/POST `/admin/projects/create` | ProjectController@create/store | admin.projects.create / .store |
| GET/PUT/DELETE `/admin/projects/{project}` | ProjectController@edit/update/destroy | admin.projects.edit / .update / .destroy |
| *(same pattern for categories, skills, testimonials — full resource except `show`)* | | |
| GET `/admin/settings` | SettingController@edit | admin.settings.edit |
| PUT `/admin/settings` | SettingController@update | admin.settings.update |
| GET `/admin/messages` | ContactMessageController@index | admin.messages.index |
| GET `/admin/messages/{message}` | ContactMessageController@show | admin.messages.show |
| PATCH `/admin/messages/{message}/read` | ContactMessageController@markRead | admin.messages.read |
| DELETE `/admin/messages/{message}` | ContactMessageController@destroy | admin.messages.destroy |

---

### 1. DashboardController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/DashboardController.php`

**View:** `resources/views/admin/dashboard.blade.php`

**Actions:** Index only (`GET /admin`).

**Capabilities:**
- Displays 4 stat cards:
  - **Projects count** — `Project::count()`
  - **Unread messages** — `ContactMessage::unread()->count()` (uses the `unread` scope: `where('is_read', false)`)
  - **Active testimonials** — `Testimonial::where('is_active', true)->count()`
  - **Skills count** — `Skill::count()`
- Shows **recent messages** (latest 5) with a "New" badge for unread ones, links to `admin.messages.show`
- Shows **recent projects** (latest 5) with "Featured" badge, links to `admin.projects.edit`
- "View All" links for both sections

---

### 2. ProjectController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/ProjectController.php`

**Views:**
- `resources/views/admin/projects/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/projects/create.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/projects/edit.blade.php`

**CRUD Actions:** Index, Create, Store, Edit, Update, Destroy (full resource except `show`).

**Fields:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `title` | text | required, max:255 |
| `category_id` | select (from categories) | required, must exist in categories table |
| `description` | textarea | required |
| `image_path` | file upload | optional, image, max 2MB |
| `project_url` | url text | optional, valid URL |
| `is_featured` | checkbox (boolean) | boolean |
| `sort_order` | number | optional, integer, defaults to 0 |

**Special features:**
- **Image upload** — stored to `storage/app/public/projects/` via `->store('projects', 'public')`
- **Auto-slug** — `Str::slug($title)` is generated on create/update
- **URL cleanup** — `#` values in `project_url` are converted to `null` before validation
- **Eager-loads category** on index; paginated (10 per page), ordered by `sort_order` then `latest`
- Index table shows: thumbnail image, title, category name, featured badge (gold), sort order, edit/delete buttons
- Edit view shows current image preview with "Leave empty to keep current image" hint
- Delete confirmation via JS `confirm()`

---

### 3. CategoryController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/CategoryController.php`

**Views:**
- `resources/views/admin/categories/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/categories/create.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/categories/edit.blade.php`

**CRUD Actions:** Index, Create, Store, Edit, Update, Destroy.

**Fields:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `name` | text | required, max:255 |
| `icon` | text | optional, max:255 (Bootstrap icon class, e.g., `bi-mortarboard`) |
| `sort_order` | number | optional, integer, defaults to 0 |

**Special features:**
- **Icon preview** — index table renders the Bootstrap icon with `<i class="bi {{ $category->icon }}">`
- **Projects count** — displayed via `withCount('projects')` on the index
- Paginated (10 per page), ordered by `sort_order`

---

### 4. SkillController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/SkillController.php`

**Views:**
- `resources/views/admin/skills/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/skills/create.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/skills/edit.blade.php`

**CRUD Actions:** Index, Create, Store, Edit, Update, Destroy.

**Fields:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `name` | text | required, max:255 |
| `category` | select dropdown | required, **in:backend,frontend,tools** (3 fixed categories) |
| `proficiency` | range slider | required, integer, 0–100 |
| `icon_class` | text | optional, max:255 (Bootstrap icon class) |
| `sort_order` | number | optional, integer, defaults to 0 |

**Special features:**
- **Proficiency range slider** — real-time updating label shows percentage as user drags: `document.getElementById('profValue').textContent=this.value+'%'`
- **Category badges** — Backend (gold), Frontend (blue), Tools (grey) shown on index
- **Progress bar** — visual proficiency bar rendered on index with gold gradient
- **Bootstrap icon preview** on index
- Paginated (10 per page), ordered by `category` then `sort_order`

---

### 5. TestimonialController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/TestimonialController.php`

**Views:**
- `resources/views/admin/testimonials/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/testimonials/create.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/testimonials/edit.blade.php`

**CRUD Actions:** Index, Create, Store, Edit, Update, Destroy.

**Fields:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `author_name` | text | required, max:255 |
| `author_role` | text | optional, max:255 |
| `author_company` | text | optional, max:255 |
| `content` | textarea | required |
| `avatar_path` | file upload | optional, image, max 2MB |
| `rating` | select (1–5) | required, integer, 1–5 |
| `is_active` | toggle switch | boolean (hidden field sends `0` when unchecked) |
| `sort_order` | number | optional, integer, defaults to 0 |

**Special features:**
- **Avatar upload** — stored to `storage/app/public/avatars/`
- **Active/Inactive toggle** — uses a form-switch (Bootstrap switch) with a hidden `is_active=0` field; active testimonials show green "Active" badge, inactive show grey "Inactive"
- **Star rating display** — on index: 5 Bootstrap star icons (filled/unfilled) + numeric badge
- **Circular avatar** — shown on index and edit with `rounded-circle` and `object-fit: cover`
- **Author role + company** concatenated on index with comma separation
- Full custom dark-themed styles for file input buttons and switches
- Paginated (10 per page), ordered by `sort_order` then `latest`

---

### 6. SettingController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/SettingController.php`

**Setting model:** `app/Models/Setting.php` — key-value store with `fillable: ['key', 'value']`. Cached via `Cache::rememberForever` (cache busted on save/delete).

**View:** `resources/views/admin/settings/edit.blade.php`

**Actions:** Edit (GET), Update (PUT) — single form for all settings.

**Fields (grouped by card sections):**

**Hero Section:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `site_name` | text | required, max:255 |
| `hero_title` | text | required, max:255 |
| `hero_subtitle` | text | required, max:255 |
| `typing_words` | text (comma-separated) | required, stored as JSON array |
| `hero_avatar` | file upload | optional, image, max 2MB |
| `current_role` | text | optional, max:255 |

**About Section:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `about_bio` | textarea (8 rows) | required |

**Contact Information:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `email` | email | required |
| `phone` | text | optional, max:255 |
| `whatsapp` | text | optional, max:255 |
| `location` | text | optional, max:255 |
| `github_url` | url | optional, valid URL |
| `linkedin_url` | url | optional, valid URL |

**Statistics:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `stat_projects` | number | optional, integer |
| `stat_clients` | number | optional, integer |
| `stat_experience` | number | optional, integer |
| `stat_technologies` | number | optional, integer |

**CV Upload:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `cv_path` | file upload | optional, max 5MB, mimes: pdf,doc,docx |

**Special features:**
- **Typing words** — comma-separated input converted to JSON array via `array_filter(array_map('trim', explode(...)))` and stored via `Setting::set('typing_words', json_encode($words))`
- **Hero avatar** — stored to `storage/app/public/avatars/`, shown as 60px rounded circle on edit form
- **CV upload** — stored to `storage/app/public/cv/`, link to current CV via `route('download.cv')`
- **Cache busting** — Setting model fires `Cache::forget('app_settings')` on save/delete
- **Bulk save** — all text fields looped through array and saved individually via `Setting::set()`
- Organized into 6 card sections: Hero, About, Contact Info, Statistics, CV Upload, Submit

---

### 7. ContactMessageController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/ContactMessageController.php`

**Model:** `app/Models/ContactMessage.php` — fields: `name`, `email`, `subject`, `message`, `is_read` (boolean, cast).

**Views:**
- `resources/views/admin/messages/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/messages/show.blade.php`

**Actions:** Index, Show, markRead (PATCH), Destroy (DELETE).

**Fields (read-only display):**
| Field | Details |
|---|---|
| `name` | bold if unread |
| `email` | clickable mailto link (`mailto:...`) |
| `subject` | truncated in list, full in show |
| `message` | full body in styled `#121212` box on show view |
| `is_read` | "New" red badge if unread; "Read" (grey) / "Unread" (red) badge |

**Special features:**
- **Filter by read/unread** — toggle buttons at top: "All" / "Unread" using `?filter=unread` query param
- **Auto-mark as read** — when viewing a message (`show`), if `is_read` is false, it auto-updates to true
- **Manual mark as read** — PATCH endpoint `messages/{message}/read` sets `is_read = true` (alternative route)
- **Reply via email** — `mailto:` link pre-filled with `Re: {subject}`
- **Unread badge in sidebar nav** — the admin layout sidebar shows a live count of unread messages: `\App\Models\ContactMessage::unread()->count()`
- Paginated (10 per page), ordered by latest first

---

### 8. AdminAuthController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/AdminAuthController.php`

**View:** `resources/views/admin/login.blade.php`

**Actions:** showLogin (GET), login (POST), logout (POST).

**Capabilities:**
- **Login form** — email + password fields with Bootstrap icon prefixes (envelope, lock)
- **"Remember me"** checkbox — `Auth::attempt($credentials, $request->boolean('remember'))`
- **Session regeneration** on login
- **Redirect if already logged in** — `showLogin()` checks `Auth::check()` and redirects to dashboard
- **Logout** — `Auth::logout()`, invalidates session, regenerates CSRF token, redirects to login
- **Error feedback** — returns `withErrors` + `withInput('email')` on failed login
- **Dark-themed standalone page** — no sidebar; centered card with radial gradient background

---

### Admin Layout (`resources/views/admin/layouts/app.blade.php`)

**Navigation sidebar** (dark, fixed 250px width):
- Dashboard (speedometer icon)
- Projects (folder icon)
- Categories (tags icon)
- Skills (bar-chart icon)
- Testimonials (chat-quote icon)
- Messages (envelope icon) — **with live unread count badge** (red)

- Responsive: sidebar collapses off-screen on mobile (<992px), toggle button and overlay
- Top bar shows page title + logged-in user name
- Session flash messages: green success alert, red error alert, red validation error list
- Dark theme (`data-bs-theme="dark"`), custom gold/blue color scheme
- Favicon is inline SVG "</>" logo

---

### Summary Matrix

| Section | Index | Create | Edit | Update | Delete | File Upload | Special |

## Admin Panel Capabilities — Complete Report

### Architecture
The admin panel is secured behind Laravel's `auth` middleware at the `/admin` prefix. The sidebar includes a live unread-message count badge.

### Routes (`routes/web.php`)
All admin routes are grouped under `Route::middleware('auth')->prefix('admin')->name('admin.')`. Four resources (Projects, Categories, Skills, Testimonials) use `Route::resource()->except('show')`. Settings uses GET/PUT. Messages has index, show, markRead (PATCH), and destroy. Auth has separate login/logout routes outside the auth middleware.

### Controllers & CRUD Summary

**1. DashboardController** (`app/Http/Controllers/DashboardController.php`)
- View: `resources/views/admin/dashboard.blade.php`

**3. CategoryController** (`app/Http/Controllers/CategoryController.php`)
- Views: `resources/views/admin/categories/index|create|edit.blade.php`
- Full CRUD. Fields: name, icon (Bootstrap icon class), sort_order.

**4. SkillController** (`app/Http/Controllers/SkillController.php`)
- Views: `resources/views/admin/skills/index|create|edit.blade.php`
- Full CRUD. Fields: name, category (backend|frontend|tools), proficiency (0–100 range slider), icon_class, sort_order.
- Special: real-time proficiency slider with percentage label, progress bar on index, colored category badges.

**5. TestimonialController** (`app/Http/Controllers/TestimonialController.php`)

- Full CRUD. Fields: author_name, author_role, author_company, content, avatar_path (file, 2MB), rating (1–5 select), is_active (toggle switch), sort_order.

**6. SettingController** (`app/Http/Controllers/SettingController.php`)

- Single form with GET/PUT. Key-value store via `Setting` model (`app/Models/Setting.php`), cached with `Cache::rememberForever`.

- Special: typing_words parsed from comma-separated to JSON array; hero avatar and CV uploads stored to storage; current CV download link shown.

**7. ContactMessageController** (`app/Http/Controllers/ContactMessageController.php`)

- Index, Show, markRead (PATCH), Destroy. Model: `ContactMessage` with `name, email, subject, message, is_read` (boolean cast).
- Special: filter by All/Unread, auto-mark-read on view, manual mark-read route, mailto reply link with pre-filled subject, unread badge in sidebar nav.

**8. AdminAuthController** (`app/Http/Controllers/AdminAuthController.php`)
- View: `resources/views/admin/login.blade.php`
- Login (GET/POST) with remember-me, session regeneration, guest redirect. Logout (POST) with session invalidation.

### Model Files
All located in `app/Models/`: Category.php, ContactMessage.php, Project.php, Setting.php, Skill.php, Testimonial.php, User.php.

Settings uses GET/PUT. Messages has index, show, markRead (PATCH), and destroy. Auth has separate login/logout routes outside the auth middleware.

### Controllers & CRUD Summary

**1. DashboardController** (`app/Http/Controllers/DashboardController.php`)
- View: `resources/views/admin/dashboard.blade.php`
- Shows 4 stat cards (projects, unread messages, active testimonials, skills counts)
- Lists 5 most recent messages and 5 most recent projects with quick-action links

**2. ProjectController** (`app/Http/Controllers/ProjectController.php`)
- Views: `resources/views/admin/projects/index|create|edit.blade.php`
- Full CRUD (except show). Fields: title, category_id, description, image_path (file, 2MB), project_url, is_featured, sort_order.
- Special: auto-slug generation, `#` URL cleanup, image stored to `storage/app/public/projects/`, eager-loads category on index.

**3. CategoryController** (`app/Http/Controllers/CategoryController.php`)
- Views: `resources/views/admin/categories/index|create|edit.blade.php`
- Full CRUD. Fields: name, icon (Bootstrap icon class), sort_order.
- Special: `withCount('projects')` on index, icon preview rendered in table.

**4. SkillController** (`app/Http/Controllers/SkillController.php`)
- Views: `resources/views/admin/skills/index|create|edit.blade.php`
- Full CRUD. Fields: name, category (backend|frontend|tools), proficiency (0–100 range slider), icon_class, sort_order.
- Special: real-time proficiency slider with percentage label, progress bar on index, colored category badges.

**5. TestimonialController** (`app/Http/Controllers/TestimonialController.php`)
- Views: `resources/views/admin/testimonials/index|create|edit.blade.php`
- Full CRUD. Fields: author_name, author_role, author_company, content, avatar_path (file, 2MB), rating (1–5 select), is_active (toggle switch), sort_order.
- Special: avatar circular crop, star-rating display, active/inactive toggle with hidden field.

**6. SettingController** (`app/Http/Controllers/SettingController.php`)
- View: `resources/views/admin/settings/edit.blade.php`
- Single form with GET/PUT. Key-value store via `Setting` model (`app/Models/Setting.php`), cached with `Cache::rememberForever`.
- 6 card sections: Hero (site_name, hero_title, hero_subtitle, typing_words, hero_avatar, current_role), About (about_bio), Contact Info (email, phone, whatsapp, location, github_url, linkedin_url), Statistics (stat_projects, stat_clients, stat_experience, stat_technologies), CV Upload (cv_path, max 5MB, pdf/doc/docx).
- Special: typing_words parsed from comma-separated to JSON array; hero avatar and CV uploads stored to storage; current CV download link shown.

**7. ContactMessageController** (`app/Http/Controllers/ContactMessageController.php`)
- Views: `resources/views/admin/messages/index|show.blade.php`
- Index, Show, markRead (PATCH), Destroy. Model: `ContactMessage` with `name, email, subject, message, is_read` (boolean cast).
- Special: filter by All/Unread, auto-mark-read on view, manual mark-read route, mailto reply link with pre-filled subject, unread badge in sidebar nav.

**8. AdminAuthController** (`app/Http/Controllers/AdminAuthController.php`)
- View: `resources/views/admin/login.blade.php`
- Login (GET/POST) with remember-me, session regeneration, guest redirect. Logout (POST) with session invalidation.

### Model Files
All located in `app/Models/`: Category.php, ContactMessage.php, Project.php, Setting.php, Skill.php, Testimonial.php, User.php.

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\Project;
use App\Models\Category;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

class ProjectController extends Controller
{
    public function index()
    {
        $projects = Project::with('category')->orderBy('sort_order')->latest()->paginate(10);
        return view('admin.projects.index', compact('projects'));
    }

    public function create()
    {
        $categories = Category::orderBy('name')->get();
        return view('admin.projects.create', compact('categories'));
    }

    public function store(Request $request)
    {
        if ($request->input('project_url') === '#') {
            $request->merge(['project_url' => null]);
        }

        $validated = $request->validate([
            'title' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'category_id' => ['required', 'exists:categories,id'],
            'description' => ['required', 'string'],
            'image_path' => ['nullable', 'image', 'max:2048'],
            'project_url' => ['nullable', 'url'],
            'is_featured' => ['boolean'],
            'sort_order' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
        ]);

        if ($request->hasFile('image_path')) {
            $validated['image_path'] = $request->file('image_path')->store('projects', 'public');
        }

        $validated['slug'] = Str::slug($validated['title']);
        $validated['is_featured'] = $request->boolean('is_featured');
        $validated['sort_order'] = $validated['sort_order'] ?? 0;

        Project::create($validated);

        return redirect()->route('admin.projects.index')->with('success', 'Project created successfully.');
    }

    public function edit(Project $project)
    {
        $categories = Category::orderBy('name')->get();
        return view('admin.projects.edit', compact('project', 'categories'));
    }

    public function update(Request $request, Project $project)
    {
        if ($request->input('project_url') === '#') {
            $request->merge(['project_url' => null]);
        }

        $validated = $request->validate([
            'title' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'category_id' => ['required', 'exists:categories,id'],
            'description' => ['required', 'string'],
            'image_path' => ['nullable', 'image', 'max:2048'],
            'project_url' => ['nullable', 'url'],
            'is_featured' => ['boolean'],
            'sort_order' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
        ]);

        if ($request->hasFile('image_path')) {
            $validated['image_path'] = $request->file('image_path')->store('projects', 'public');
        }

        $validated['slug'] = Str::slug($validated['title']);
        $validated['is_featured'] = $request->boolean('is_featured');
        $validated['sort_order'] = $validated['sort_order'] ?? 0;

        $project->update($validated);

        return redirect()->route('admin.projects.index')->with('success', 'Project updated successfully.');
    }

    public function destroy(Project $project)
    {
        $project->delete();
        return redirect()->route('admin.projects.index')->with('success', 'Project deleted successfully.');
    }
}

            $validated['avatar_path'] = $request->file('avatar_path')->store('avatars', 'public');
        }

        $validated['is_active'] = $request->boolean('is_active');
        $validated['sort_order'] = $validated['sort_order'] ?? 0;

        Testimonial::create($validated);

        return redirect()->route('admin.testimonials.index')->with('success', 'Testimonial created successfully.');
    }

    public function edit(Testimonial $testimonial)
    {
        return view('admin.testimonials.edit', compact('testimonial'));
    }

    public function update(Request $request, Testimonial $testimonial)
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'author_name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'author_role' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'author_company' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'content' => ['required', 'string'],
            'avatar_path' => ['nullable', 'image', 'max:2048'],
            'rating' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:1', 'max:5'],
            'is_active' => ['boolean'],
            'sort_order' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
        ]);

        if ($request->hasFile('avatar_path')) {
            $validated['avatar_path'] = $request->file('avatar_path')->store('avatars', 'public');
        }

        $validated['is_active'] = $request->boolean('is_active');
        $validated['sort_order'] = $validated['sort_order'] ?? 0;

        $testimonial->update($validated);

        return redirect()->route('admin.testimonials.index')->with('success', 'Testimonial updated successfully.');
    }

    public function destroy(Testimonial $testimonial)
    {
        $testimonial->delete();
        return redirect()->route('admin.testimonials.index')->with('success', 'Testimonial deleted successfully.');
    }
}

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Models\Setting;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;

class SettingController extends Controller
{
    public function edit()
    {
        $settings = Setting::allSettings();
        return view('admin.settings.edit', compact('settings'));
    }

    public function update(Request $request)
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'site_name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'hero_title' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'hero_subtitle' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'typing_words' => ['required', 'string'],
            'about_bio' => ['required', 'string'],
            'current_role' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'location' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'email' => ['required', 'email'],
            'phone' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'whatsapp' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'github_url' => ['nullable', 'url'],
            'linkedin_url' => ['nullable', 'url'],
            'hero_avatar' => ['nullable', 'image', 'max:2048'],
            'cv_path' => ['nullable', 'file', 'max:5120', 'mimes:pdf,doc,docx'],
            'stat_projects' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
            'stat_clients' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
            'stat_experience' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
            'stat_technologies' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
        ]);

        // Process typing words into JSON
        $words = array_filter(array_map('trim', explode(',', $validated['typing_words'])));
        Setting::set('typing_words', json_encode($words));

        // Save text settings
        $textKeys = [
            'site_name', 'hero_title', 'hero_subtitle', 'about_bio',
            'current_role', 'location', 'email', 'phone', 'whatsapp',
            'github_url', 'linkedin_url',
            'stat_projects', 'stat_clients', 'stat_experience', 'stat_technologies',
        ];

        foreach ($textKeys as $key) {
            Setting::set($key, $validated[$key] ?? null);
        }

        // Handle avatar upload
        if ($request->hasFile('hero_avatar')) {
            Setting::set('hero_avatar', $request->file('hero_avatar')->store('avatars', 'public'));
        }

        // Handle CV upload
        if ($request->hasFile('cv_path')) {
            Setting::set('cv_path', $request->file('cv_path')->store('cv', 'public'));
        }

        return redirect()->route('admin.settings.edit')->with('success', 'Settings updated successfully.');
    }
}

    }

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;

class AdminAuthController extends Controller
{
    public function showLogin()
    {
        if (Auth::check()) {
            return redirect()->route('admin.dashboard');
        }

        return view('admin.login');
    }

    public function login(Request $request)
    {
        $credentials = $request->validate([
            'email' => ['required', 'email'],
            'password' => ['required'],
        ]);

        if (Auth::attempt($credentials, $request->boolean('remember'))) {
            $request->session()->regenerate();
            return redirect()->intended(route('admin.dashboard'));
        }

        return back()->withErrors([
            'email' => 'The provided credentials do not match our records.',
        ])->onlyInput('email');
    }

    public function logout(Request $request)
    {
        Auth::logout();
        $request->session()->invalidate();
        $request->session()->regenerateToken();
        return redirect()->route('admin.login');
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Cache;

class Setting extends Model
{
    protected $fillable = ['key', 'value'];

    protected static function boot(): void
    {
        parent::boot();

        static::saved(function () {
            Cache::forget('app_settings');
        });

        static::deleted(function () {
            Cache::forget('app_settings');
        });
    }

    public static function get(string $key, $default = null)
    {
        $settings = self::all();

        $setting = $settings->firstWhere('key', $key);

        return $setting?->value ?? $default;
    }

    public static function set(string $key, $value): void
    {
        self::updateOrCreate(
            ['key' => $key],
            ['value' => $value]
        );
    }

    public static function allSettings(): array
    {
        return Cache::rememberForever('app_settings', function () {
            return self::pluck('value', 'key')->toArray();
        });
    }
}

---

## Admin Panel Capabilities — Complete Report

### Routes (confirmed from `routes/web.php`)

All admin routes live under the `/admin` prefix, protected by `auth` middleware, and use the `admin.` route name prefix.

| Route | Controller@method | Name |
|---|---|---|
| GET `/admin/login` | AdminAuthController@showLogin | admin.login |
| POST `/admin/login` | AdminAuthController@login | — |
| POST `/admin/logout` | AdminAuthController@logout | admin.logout |
| GET `/admin` | DashboardController@index | admin.dashboard |
| GET `/admin/projects` | ProjectController@index | admin.projects.index |
| GET/POST `/admin/projects/create` | ProjectController@create/store | admin.projects.create / .store |
| GET/PUT/DELETE `/admin/projects/{project}` | ProjectController@edit/update/destroy | admin.projects.edit / .update / .destroy |
| *(same pattern for categories, skills, testimonials — full resource except `show`)* | | |
| GET `/admin/settings` | SettingController@edit | admin.settings.edit |
| PUT `/admin/settings` | SettingController@update | admin.settings.update |
| GET `/admin/messages` | ContactMessageController@index | admin.messages.index |
| GET `/admin/messages/{message}` | ContactMessageController@show | admin.messages.show |
| PATCH `/admin/messages/{message}/read` | ContactMessageController@markRead | admin.messages.read |
| DELETE `/admin/messages/{message}` | ContactMessageController@destroy | admin.messages.destroy |

---

### 1. DashboardController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/DashboardController.php`

**View:** `resources/views/admin/dashboard.blade.php`

**Actions:** Index only (`GET /admin`).

**Capabilities:**
- Displays 4 stat cards:
  - **Projects count** — `Project::count()`
  - **Unread messages** — `ContactMessage::unread()->count()` (uses the `unread` scope: `where('is_read', false)`)
  - **Active testimonials** — `Testimonial::where('is_active', true)->count()`
  - **Skills count** — `Skill::count()`
- Shows **recent messages** (latest 5) with a "New" badge for unread ones, links to `admin.messages.show`
- Shows **recent projects** (latest 5) with "Featured" badge, links to `admin.projects.edit`
- "View All" links for both sections

---

### 2. ProjectController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/ProjectController.php`

**Views:**
- `resources/views/admin/projects/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/projects/create.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/projects/edit.blade.php`

**CRUD Actions:** Index, Create, Store, Edit, Update, Destroy (full resource except `show`).

**Fields:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `title` | text | required, max:255 |
| `category_id` | select (from categories) | required, must exist in categories table |
| `description` | textarea | required |
| `image_path` | file upload | optional, image, max 2MB |
| `project_url` | url text | optional, valid URL |
| `is_featured` | checkbox (boolean) | boolean |
| `sort_order` | number | optional, integer, defaults to 0 |

**Special features:**
- **Image upload** — stored to `storage/app/public/projects/` via `->store('projects', 'public')`
- **Auto-slug** — `Str::slug($title)` is generated on create/update
- **URL cleanup** — `#` values in `project_url` are converted to `null` before validation
- **Eager-loads category** on index; paginated (10 per page), ordered by `sort_order` then `latest`
- Index table shows: thumbnail image, title, category name, featured badge (gold), sort order, edit/delete buttons
- Edit view shows current image preview with "Leave empty to keep current image" hint
- Delete confirmation via JS `confirm()`

---

### 3. CategoryController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/CategoryController.php`

**Views:**
- `resources/views/admin/categories/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/categories/create.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/categories/edit.blade.php`

**CRUD Actions:** Index, Create, Store, Edit, Update, Destroy.

**Fields:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `name` | text | required, max:255 |
| `icon` | text | optional, max:255 (Bootstrap icon class, e.g., `bi-mortarboard`) |
| `sort_order` | number | optional, integer, defaults to 0 |

**Special features:**
- **Icon preview** — index table renders the Bootstrap icon with `<i class="bi {{ $category->icon }}">`
- **Projects count** — displayed via `withCount('projects')` on the index
- Paginated (10 per page), ordered by `sort_order`

---

### 4. SkillController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/SkillController.php`

**Views:**
- `resources/views/admin/skills/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/skills/create.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/skills/edit.blade.php`

**CRUD Actions:** Index, Create, Store, Edit, Update, Destroy.

**Fields:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `name` | text | required, max:255 |
| `category` | select dropdown | required, **in:backend,frontend,tools** (3 fixed categories) |
| `proficiency` | range slider | required, integer, 0–100 |
| `icon_class` | text | optional, max:255 (Bootstrap icon class) |
| `sort_order` | number | optional, integer, defaults to 0 |

**Special features:**
- **Proficiency range slider** — real-time updating label shows percentage as user drags: `document.getElementById('profValue').textContent=this.value+'%'`
- **Category badges** — Backend (gold), Frontend (blue), Tools (grey) shown on index
- **Progress bar** — visual proficiency bar rendered on index with gold gradient
- **Bootstrap icon preview** on index
- Paginated (10 per page), ordered by `category` then `sort_order`

---

### 5. TestimonialController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/TestimonialController.php`

**Views:**
- `resources/views/admin/testimonials/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/testimonials/create.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/testimonials/edit.blade.php`

**CRUD Actions:** Index, Create, Store, Edit, Update, Destroy.

**Fields:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `author_name` | text | required, max:255 |
| `author_role` | text | optional, max:255 |
| `author_company` | text | optional, max:255 |
| `content` | textarea | required |
| `avatar_path` | file upload | optional, image, max 2MB |
| `rating` | select (1–5) | required, integer, 1–5 |
| `is_active` | toggle switch | boolean (hidden field sends `0` when unchecked) |
| `sort_order` | number | optional, integer, defaults to 0 |

**Special features:**
- **Avatar upload** — stored to `storage/app/public/avatars/`
- **Active/Inactive toggle** — uses a form-switch (Bootstrap switch) with a hidden `is_active=0` field; active testimonials show green "Active" badge, inactive show grey "Inactive"
- **Star rating display** — on index: 5 Bootstrap star icons (filled/unfilled) + numeric badge
- **Circular avatar** — shown on index and edit with `rounded-circle` and `object-fit: cover`
- **Author role + company** concatenated on index with comma separation
- Full custom dark-themed styles for file input buttons and switches
- Paginated (10 per page), ordered by `sort_order` then `latest`

---

### 6. SettingController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/SettingController.php`

**Setting model:** `app/Models/Setting.php` — key-value store with `fillable: ['key', 'value']`. Cached via `Cache::rememberForever` (cache busted on save/delete).

**View:** `resources/views/admin/settings/edit.blade.php`

**Actions:** Edit (GET), Update (PUT) — single form for all settings.

**Fields (grouped by card sections):**

**Hero Section:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `site_name` | text | required, max:255 |
| `hero_title` | text | required, max:255 |
| `hero_subtitle` | text | required, max:255 |
| `typing_words` | text (comma-separated) | required, stored as JSON array |
| `hero_avatar` | file upload | optional, image, max 2MB |
| `current_role` | text | optional, max:255 |

**About Section:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `about_bio` | textarea (8 rows) | required |

**Contact Information:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `email` | email | required |
| `phone` | text | optional, max:255 |
| `whatsapp` | text | optional, max:255 |
| `location` | text | optional, max:255 |
| `github_url` | url | optional, valid URL |
| `linkedin_url` | url | optional, valid URL |

**Statistics:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `stat_projects` | number | optional, integer |
| `stat_clients` | number | optional, integer |
| `stat_experience` | number | optional, integer |
| `stat_technologies` | number | optional, integer |

**CV Upload:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `cv_path` | file upload | optional, max 5MB, mimes: pdf,doc,docx |

**Special features:**
- **Typing words** — comma-separated input converted to JSON array via `array_filter(array_map('trim', explode(...)))` and stored via `Setting::set('typing_words', json_encode($words))`
- **Hero avatar** — stored to `storage/app/public/avatars/`, shown as 60px rounded circle on edit form
- **CV upload** — stored to `storage/app/public/cv/`, link to current CV via `route('download.cv')`
- **Cache busting** — Setting model fires `Cache::forget('app_settings')` on save/delete
- **Bulk save** — all text fields looped through array and saved individually via `Setting::set()`
- Organized into 6 card sections: Hero, About, Contact Info, Statistics, CV Upload, Submit

---

### 7. ContactMessageController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/ContactMessageController.php`

**Model:** `app/Models/ContactMessage.php` — fields: `name`, `email`, `subject`, `message`, `is_read` (boolean, cast).

**Views:**
- `resources/views/admin/messages/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/messages/show.blade.php`

**Actions:** Index, Show, markRead (PATCH), Destroy (DELETE).

**Fields (read-only display):**
| Field | Details |
|---|---|
| `name` | bold if unread |
| `email` | clickable mailto link (`mailto:...`) |
| `subject` | truncated in list, full in show |
| `message` | full body in styled `#121212` box on show view |
| `is_read` | "New" red badge if unread; "Read" (grey) / "Unread" (red) badge |

**Special features:**
- **Filter by read/unread** — toggle buttons at top: "All" / "Unread" using `?filter=unread` query param
- **Auto-mark as read** — when viewing a message (`show`), if `is_read` is false, it auto-updates to true
- **Manual mark as read** — PATCH endpoint `messages/{message}/read` sets `is_read = true` (alternative route)
- **Reply via email** — `mailto:` link pre-filled with `Re: {subject}`
- **Unread badge in sidebar nav** — the admin layout sidebar shows a live count of unread messages: `\App\Models\ContactMessage::unread()->count()`
- Paginated (10 per page), ordered by latest first

---

### 8. AdminAuthController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/AdminAuthController.php`

**View:** `resources/views/admin/login.blade.php`

**Actions:** showLogin (GET), login (POST), logout (POST).

**Capabilities:**
- **Login form** — email + password fields with Bootstrap icon prefixes (envelope, lock)
- **"Remember me"** checkbox — `Auth::attempt($credentials, $request->boolean('remember'))`
- **Session regeneration** on login
- **Redirect if already logged in** — `showLogin()` checks `Auth::check()` and redirects to dashboard
- **Logout** — `Auth::logout()`, invalidates session, regenerates CSRF token, redirects to login
- **Error feedback** — returns `withErrors` + `withInput('email')` on failed login
- **Dark-themed standalone page** — no sidebar; centered card with radial gradient background

---

### Admin Layout (`resources/views/admin/layouts/app.blade.php`)

**Navigation sidebar** (dark, fixed 250px width):
- Dashboard (speedometer icon)
- Projects (folder icon)
- Categories (tags icon)
- Skills (bar-chart icon)
- Testimonials (chat-quote icon)
- Messages (envelope icon) — **with live unread count badge** (red)
- Settings (gear icon)
- View Site (external link icon, opens `route('home')` in new tab)
- Logout (POST form with CSRF)

**Key layout features:**
- Active nav state highlighted with gold left-border and background
- Responsive: sidebar collapses off-screen on mobile (<992px), toggle button and overlay
- Top bar shows page title + logged-in user name
- Session flash messages: green success alert, red error alert, red validation error list
- Dark theme (`data-bs-theme="dark"`), custom gold/blue color scheme
- Favicon is inline SVG "</>" logo

---

### Summary Matrix

| Section | Index | Create | Edit | Update | Delete | File Upload | Special |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Dashboard | ✅ stats+widgets | — | — | — | — | — | Unread count, recent items |
| Projects | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | Image (2MB) | Auto-slug, featured toggle, sort order |
| Categories | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | — | Bootstrap icon picker, projects count |
| Skills | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | — | Range slider, proficiency %, 3 fixed categories |
| Testimonials | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | Avatar (2MB) | Star rating 1-5, active/inactive toggle |
| Settings | — | — | ✅ | ✅ | — | Avatar (2MB), CV (5MB, pdf/doc/docx) | Typing words→JSON, key-value cache, 6 card sections |
| Messages | ✅ (filterable) | — | — | — | ✅ | — | Auto mark-read, mailto reply, PATCH mark-read |
| Auth | — | — | — | — | — | — | Remember me, session regen, guest redirect |

| `stat_projects` | number | optional, integer |
| `stat_clients` | number | optional, integer |
| `stat_experience` | number | optional, integer |
| `stat_technologies` | number | optional, integer |

**CV Upload:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `cv_path` | file upload | optional, max 5MB, mimes: pdf,doc,docx |

**Special features:**
- **Typing words** — comma-separated input converted to JSON array via `array_filter(array_map('trim', explode(...)))` and stored via `Setting::set('typing_words', json_encode($words))`
- **Hero avatar** — stored to `storage/app/public/avatars/`, shown as 60px rounded circle on edit form
- **CV upload** — stored to `storage/app/public/cv/`, link to current CV via `route('download.cv')`
- **Cache busting** — Setting model fires `Cache::forget('app_settings')` on save/delete
- **Bulk save** — all text fields looped through array and saved individually via `Setting::set()`
- Organized into 6 card sections: Hero, About, Contact Info, Statistics, CV Upload, Submit

---

### 7. ContactMessageController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/ContactMessageController.php`

**Model:** `app/Models/ContactMessage.php` — fields: `name`, `email`, `subject`, `message`, `is_read` (boolean, cast).

**Views:**
- `resources/views/admin/messages/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/messages/show.blade.php`

**Actions:** Index, Show, markRead (PATCH), Destroy (DELETE).

**Fields (read-only display):**
| Field | Details |
|---|---|
| `name` | bold if unread |
| `email` | clickable mailto link (`mailto:...`) |
| `subject` | truncated in list, full in show |
| `message` | full body in styled `#121212` box on show view |
| `is_read` | "New" red badge if unread; "Read" (grey) / "Unread" (red) badge |

**Special features:**
- **Filter by read/unread** — toggle buttons at top: "All" / "Unread" using `?filter=unread` query param
- **Auto-mark as read** — when viewing a message (`show`), if `is_read` is false, it auto-updates to true
- **Manual mark as read** — PATCH endpoint `messages/{message}/read` sets `is_read = true` (alternative route)
- **Reply via email** — `mailto:` link pre-filled with `Re: {subject}`
- **Unread badge in sidebar nav** — the admin layout sidebar shows a live count of unread messages: `\App\Models\ContactMessage::unread()->count()`
- Paginated (10 per page), ordered by latest first

---

### 8. AdminAuthController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/AdminAuthController.php`

**View:** `resources/views/admin/login.blade.php`

**Actions:** showLogin (GET), login (POST), logout (POST).

**Capabilities:**
- **Login form** — email + password fields with Bootstrap icon prefixes (envelope, lock)
- **"Remember me"** checkbox — `Auth::attempt($credentials, $request->boolean('remember'))`
- **Session regeneration** on login
- **Redirect if already logged in** — `showLogin()` checks `Auth::check()` and redirects to dashboard
- **Logout** — `Auth::logout()`, invalidates session, regenerates CSRF token, redirects to login
- **Error feedback** — returns `withErrors` + `withInput('email')` on failed login
- **Dark-themed standalone page** — no sidebar; centered card with radial gradient background

---

### Admin Layout (`resources/views/admin/layouts/app.blade.php`)

**Navigation sidebar** (dark, fixed 250px width):
- Dashboard (speedometer icon)
- Projects (folder icon)
- Categories (tags icon)
- Skills (bar-chart icon)
- Testimonials (chat-quote icon)
- Messages (envelope icon) — **with live unread count badge** (red)
- Settings (gear icon)
- View Site (external link icon, opens `route('home')` in new tab)
- Logout (POST form with CSRF)

**Key layout features:**
- Active nav state highlighted with gold left-border and background
- Responsive: sidebar collapses off-screen on mobile (<992px), toggle button and overlay
- Top bar shows page title + logged-in user name
- Session flash messages: green success alert, red error alert, red validation error list
- Dark theme (`data-bs-theme="dark"`), custom gold/blue color scheme
- Favicon is inline SVG "</>" logo

---

### Summary Matrix

| Section | Index | Create | Edit | Update | Delete | File Upload | Special |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Dashboard | ✅ stats+widgets | — | — | — | — | — | Unread count, recent items |
| Projects | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | Image (2MB) | Auto-slug, featured toggle, sort order |
| Categories | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | — | Bootstrap icon picker, projects count |
| Skills | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | — | Range slider, proficiency %, 3 fixed categories |
| Testimonials | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | Avatar (2MB) | Star rating 1-5, active/inactive toggle |
| Settings | — | — | ✅ | ✅ | — | Avatar (2MB), CV (5MB, pdf/doc/docx) | Typing words→JSON, key-value cache, 6 card sections |
| Messages | ✅ (filterable) | — | — | — | ✅ | — | Auto mark-read, mailto reply, PATCH mark-read |
| Auth | — | — | — | — | — | — | Remember me, session regen, guest redirect |

## Admin Panel Capabilities — Complete Report

### Architecture
The admin panel is secured behind Laravel's `auth` middleware at the `/admin` prefix. It has a dark-themed sidebar layout (`resources/views/admin/layouts/app.blade.php`) with 7 navigation items plus logout, with a responsive collapsible sidebar for mobile. The sidebar includes a live unread-message count badge.

### Routes (`routes/web.php`)
All admin routes are grouped under `Route::middleware('auth')->prefix('admin')->name('admin.')`. Four resources (Projects, Categories, Skills, Testimonials) use `Route::resource()->except('show')`. Settings uses GET/PUT. Messages has index, show, markRead (PATCH), and destroy. Auth has separate login/logout routes outside the auth middleware.

### Controllers & CRUD Summary

**1. DashboardController** (`app/Http/Controllers/DashboardController.php`)
- View: `resources/views/admin/dashboard.blade.php`
- Shows 4 stat cards (projects, unread messages, active testimonials, skills counts)
- Lists 5 most recent messages and 5 most recent projects with quick-action links

**2. ProjectController** (`app/Http/Controllers/ProjectController.php`)
- Views: `resources/views/admin/projects/index|create|edit.blade.php`
- Full CRUD (except show). Fields: title, category_id, description, image_path (file, 2MB), project_url, is_featured, sort_order.
- Special: auto-slug generation, `#` URL cleanup, image stored to `storage/app/public/projects/`, eager-loads category on index.

**3. CategoryController** (`app/Http/Controllers/CategoryController.php`)
- Views: `resources/views/admin/categories/index|create|edit.blade.php`
- Full CRUD. Fields: name, icon (Bootstrap icon class), sort_order.
- Special: `withCount('projects')` on index, icon preview rendered in table.

**4. SkillController** (`app/Http/Controllers/SkillController.php`)
- Views: `resources/views/admin/skills/index|create|edit.blade.php`
- Full CRUD. Fields: name, category (backend|frontend|tools), proficiency (0–100 range slider), icon_class, sort_order.
- Special: real-time proficiency slider with percentage label, progress bar on index, colored category badges.

**5. TestimonialController** (`app/Http/Controllers/TestimonialController.php`)
- Views: `resources/views/admin/testimonials/index|create|edit.blade.php`
- Full CRUD. Fields: author_name, author_role, author_company, content, avatar_path (file, 2MB), rating (1–5 select), is_active (toggle switch), sort_order.
- Special: avatar circular crop, star-rating display, active/inactive toggle with hidden field.

**6. SettingController** (`app/Http/Controllers/SettingController.php`)
- View: `resources/views/admin/settings/edit.blade.php`
- Single form with GET/PUT. Key-value store via `Setting` model (`app/Models/Setting.php`), cached with `Cache::rememberForever`.
- 6 card sections: Hero (site_name, hero_title, hero_subtitle, typing_words, hero_avatar, current_role), About (about_bio), Contact Info (email, phone, whatsapp, location, github_url, linkedin_url), Statistics (stat_projects, stat_clients, stat_experience, stat_technologies), CV Upload (cv_path, max 5MB, pdf/doc/docx).
- Special: typing_words parsed from comma-separated to JSON array; hero avatar and CV uploads stored to storage; current CV download link shown.

**7. ContactMessageController** (`app/Http/Controllers/ContactMessageController.php`)
- Views: `resources/views/admin/messages/index|show.blade.php`
- Index, Show, markRead (PATCH), Destroy. Model: `ContactMessage` with `name, email, subject, message, is_read` (boolean cast).
- Special: filter by All/Unread, auto-mark-read on view, manual mark-read route, mailto reply link with pre-filled subject, unread badge in sidebar nav.

**8. AdminAuthController** (`app/Http/Controllers/AdminAuthController.php`)
- View: `resources/views/admin/login.blade.php`
- Login (GET/POST) with remember-me, session regeneration, guest redirect. Logout (POST) with session invalidation.

### Model Files
All located in `app/Models/`: Category.php, ContactMessage.php, Project.php, Setting.php, Skill.php, Testimonial.php, User.php.

functionDeclarations.name: glob
functionDeclarations.description: Efficiently finds files matching specific glob patterns (e.g., `src/**/*.ts`, `**/*.md`), returning absolute paths sorted by modification time (newest first). Ideal for quickly locating files based on their name or path structure, especially in large codebases.

pattern.description: The glob pattern to match against (e.g., '**/*.py', 'docs/*.md').

path.description: Optional: The absolute path to the directory to search within. If omitted, searches the root directory.

case_sensitive.description: Optional: Whether the search should be case-sensitive. Defaults to false.

include_hidden.description: Optional: Whether to descend into dot-prefixed directories (e.g. '.git/', '.codely-cli/') and match dot-prefixed files. Defaults to false to mirror search content tools. Set to true to scan hidden paths explicitly.

maxResults.description: Optional: Maximum number of file paths to return (default: 100). Use to limit output for broad patterns. When the cap is hit the result is paginated; pass 'offset' set to the previous offset+maxResults to continue.

offset.description: Optional: Number of matching file paths to skip before returning results. Use this to continue after a truncated result's next offset.

functionDeclarations.name: list_directory
functionDeclarations.description: Lists the names of files and subdirectories directly within a specified directory path. Can optionally ignore entries matching provided glob patterns.

path.description: The absolute path to the directory to list (must be absolute, not relative)

ignore.description: List of glob patterns to ignore

functionDeclarations.name: read_file
functionDeclarations.description: Reads and returns the content of a specified file. By default reads up to 2000 lines starting from the beginning of the file. Files whose selected range exceeds 256 KB are truncated with an advisory; use 'offset' and 'limit' only if the file is too large to read at once — it's recommended to read the whole file by not providing these parameters. Handles text files. For images, PDFs, videos, audio or other multimedia files, this tool cannot present their contents to the model — use the 'analyze_multimedia' tool instead.

absolute_path.description: The absolute path to the file to read (e.g., '/home/user/project/file.txt'). Relative paths are not supported. You must provide an absolute path.

offset.description: Optional: For text files, the 0-based line number to start reading from. Only provide if the file is too large to read at once. Note: search_file_content reports matches as 1-based `Lxx` line numbers; to jump from a hit at `L42` here, subtract 1 — pass `offset: 41` (i.e. `offset = lineNumber - 1`).

limit.description: Optional: For text files, the maximum number of lines to read. Only provide if the file is too large to read at once.

functionDeclarations.name: run_shell_command
functionDeclarations.description:
This tool executes a given shell command using the best available Windows shell (PowerShell Core, Windows PowerShell, or Command Prompt).

IMPORTANT:
- This tool is for terminal operations (e.g., git / npm / docker / build & test commands).
- DO NOT use this tool for file operations like reading, writing, editing, or searching files. Prefer the dedicated file tools for those actions.
- Quote any file path that contains spaces with double quotes, e.g. `cd "/path with spaces"` or `python "/path with spaces/script.py"`.
- If a command would produce very large output, prefer adding flags/filters (narrow paths, limit counts, request specific fields, machine-readable formats like JSON) to keep output small and unambiguous.
- Very large outputs may be returned as the most recent tail of the output. Earlier content may be truncated from the beginning. If the tool reports a "Full output saved to: <path>", that file contains the full command output. Use the exact path returned by the tool, then prefer searching that file first (grep/rg or platform equivalents) for specific ERROR/WARN/FAIL/SUCCESS markers, then reading small slices (with `read_file` using `offset`/`limit`) or tailing the log file instead of re-running expensive commands.
- Do not append truncating pipelines such as `| tail`, `| Select-Object -Last`, or similar to an expensive first run just to suppress output. Those discard earlier context and force a re-run if you later need omitted lines. Let the tool/log capture the full output, then inspect the saved log file.
- When issuing multiple shell commands in one response, parallelize only when they are truly independent and do not compete for the same files, directories, logs, locks, caches, git state, or ports. If one command depends on another or shared state may race, run them sequentially.

The following information is returned:
- Command: Executed command.
- Directory: Directory where command was executed, or `(root)`.
- Output: Combined command output (stdout/stderr). Can be `(empty)` or an excerpt if very large.
- Error: Error or `(none)` if no error was reported for the subprocess.
- Exit Code: Exit code or `(none)` if terminated by signal.
- Signal: Signal number or `(none)` if no signal was received.

command.description: Exact command to execute using the best available Windows shell (automatically selected from PowerShell Core, Windows PowerShell, or Command Prompt). Quote any file paths containing spaces with double quotes.

description.description: Brief description of the command for the user. Be specific and concise. Ideally a single sentence. Can be up to 3 sentences for clarity. No line breaks.

directory.description: (OPTIONAL) The absolute path of the directory to run the command in. If not provided, the project root directory is used. Must be a directory within the workspace and must already exist.

functionDeclarations.name: search_file_content
functionDeclarations.description: Searches for a regular expression pattern within the content of files in a specified directory, a specific file, or the current working directory. The search backend is ripgrep, so regex patterns use ripgrep/Rust regex syntax, not JavaScript RegExp syntax. If you need to search literal text that contains regex metacharacters (for example $, {, [, (, or \), set fixed_strings: true or -F: true instead of escaping by hand. Can filter files by a glob pattern when searching directories. By default, returns matching lines with file paths and line numbers; set output_mode to "files_with_matches" for just file paths or "count" for per-file match totals. Each matched line is truncated at 500 characters with a "[line truncated from N chars]" suffix to keep minified or base64 content from blowing up context.

pattern.description: The regular expression pattern to search for within file contents. This is interpreted by ripgrep/Rust regex, not JavaScript RegExp; avoid JS-only features such as lookbehind and backreferences. Regex syntax errors are returned by ripgrep. For literal text, especially strings containing regex metacharacters like $, {, [, (, or \, prefer fixed_strings: true or -F: true. When passing JSON args, escape only for JSON once: to match literal ${, use pattern "\\$\\{" (the regex engine sees \$\{), not "\\\\$\\\\{".

path.description: Optional: A path relative to the workspace root, or an absolute path to a directory or file to search within. If a file path is provided, searches only within that file. If a directory path is provided, searches all files in that directory. If omitted, searches the current working directory.

glob.description: Optional: A glob pattern to filter which files are searched (e.g., '*.js', '*.{ts,tsx}', 'src/**'). Single string only — combine multiple patterns via whitespace/comma separation (e.g. '*.js *.ts', '*.js,*.ts') or brace expansion ('*.{ts,tsx}'). Only applicable when searching directories, ignored for file searches. If omitted, searches all files (respecting potential global ignores).

output_mode.description: Optional: Output format. 'content' (default) returns matching lines with line numbers and optional context; 'files_with_matches' returns only the list of matching file paths; 'count' returns per-file match counts.

maxResults.description: Optional: Maximum number of matches to return to prevent context overflow (default: 250, max: 1000). Values above 1000 are clamped automatically. Use lower values for broad searches, higher for specific searches. Pass 0 for unlimited.

head_limit.description: Optional: Claude Code aligned alias for 'maxResults'. When both are provided, head_limit wins. Pass 0 for unlimited (use sparingly — large result sets waste context).

offset.description: Optional: Number of matches to skip before returning results. Use this to continue after a truncated result's next offset.

-A.description: Optional: Number of context lines to show after each match. Only applies to 'content' output_mode. Alias for ripgrep's -A.

-B.description: Optional: Number of context lines to show before each match. Only applies to 'content' output_mode. Alias for ripgrep's -B.

-C.description: Optional: Number of context lines to show before and after each match. Only applies to 'content' output_mode. Alias for ripgrep's -C.

context.description: Optional: Number of context lines to show before and after each match. Only applies to 'content' output_mode. Alias for -C.

-n.description: Optional: Whether to include line numbers in 'content' output. Defaults to true; set to false to omit them.

-i.description: Optional: Case-insensitive matching. Defaults to false (case-sensitive), matching ripgrep behavior.

fixed_strings.description: Optional: Treat the pattern as a literal string instead of a regular expression. Alias for -F.

-F.description: Optional: Treat the pattern as a literal string instead of a regular expression. Alias for fixed_strings.

type.description: Optional: ripgrep file type filter (rg --type). Common types: js, py, rust, go, java, etc. Accepts any alias from `rg --type-list`; the value is forwarded verbatim to ripgrep.

multiline.description: Optional: Enable multiline matching where patterns may span newlines (passes -U and --multiline-dotall to ripgrep). Only meaningful for 'content' output_mode. ^/$ anchors keep line boundaries behavior for portability across search backends.
