## Admin Panel Capabilities — Complete Report

### Routes (confirmed from `routes/web.php`)

All admin routes live under the `/admin` prefix, protected by `auth` middleware, and use the `admin.` route name prefix.

| Route | Controller@method | Name |
|---|---|---|
| GET `/admin/login` | AdminAuthController@showLogin | admin.login |
| POST `/admin/login` | AdminAuthController@login | — |
| POST `/admin/logout` | AdminAuthController@logout | admin.logout |
| GET `/admin` | DashboardController@index | admin.dashboard |
| GET `/admin/projects` | ProjectController@index | admin.projects.index |
| GET/POST `/admin/projects/create` | ProjectController@create/store | admin.projects.create / .store |
| GET/PUT/DELETE `/admin/projects/{project}` | ProjectController@edit/update/destroy | admin.projects.edit / .update / .destroy |
| *(same pattern for categories, skills, testimonials — full resource except `show`)* | | |
| GET `/admin/settings` | SettingController@edit | admin.settings.edit |
| PUT `/admin/settings` | SettingController@update | admin.settings.update |
| GET `/admin/messages` | ContactMessageController@index | admin.messages.index |
| GET `/admin/messages/{message}` | ContactMessageController@show | admin.messages.show |
| PATCH `/admin/messages/{message}/read` | ContactMessageController@markRead | admin.messages.read |
| DELETE `/admin/messages/{message}` | ContactMessageController@destroy | admin.messages.destroy |

---

### 1. DashboardController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/DashboardController.php`

**View:** `resources/views/admin/dashboard.blade.php`

**Actions:** Index only (`GET /admin`).

**Capabilities:**
- Displays 4 stat cards:
  - **Projects count** — `Project::count()`
  - **Unread messages** — `ContactMessage::unread()->count()` (uses the `unread` scope: `where('is_read', false)`)
  - **Active testimonials** — `Testimonial::where('is_active', true)->count()`
  - **Skills count** — `Skill::count()`
- Shows **recent messages** (latest 5) with a "New" badge for unread ones, links to `admin.messages.show`
- Shows **recent projects** (latest 5) with "Featured" badge, links to `admin.projects.edit`
- "View All" links for both sections

---

### 2. ProjectController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/ProjectController.php`

**Views:**
- `resources/views/admin/projects/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/projects/create.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/projects/edit.blade.php`

**CRUD Actions:** Index, Create, Store, Edit, Update, Destroy (full resource except `show`).

**Fields:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `title` | text | required, max:255 |
| `category_id` | select (from categories) | required, must exist in categories table |
| `description` | textarea | required |
| `image_path` | file upload | optional, image, max 2MB |
| `project_url` | url text | optional, valid URL |
| `is_featured` | checkbox (boolean) | boolean |
| `sort_order` | number | optional, integer, defaults to 0 |

**Special features:**
- **Image upload** — stored to `storage/app/public/projects/` via `->store('projects', 'public')`
- **Auto-slug** — `Str::slug($title)` is generated on create/update
- **URL cleanup** — `#` values in `project_url` are converted to `null` before validation
- **Eager-loads category** on index; paginated (10 per page), ordered by `sort_order` then `latest`
- Index table shows: thumbnail image, title, category name, featured badge (gold), sort order, edit/delete buttons
- Edit view shows current image preview with "Leave empty to keep current image" hint
- Delete confirmation via JS `confirm()`

---

### 3. CategoryController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/CategoryController.php`

**Views:**
- `resources/views/admin/categories/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/categories/create.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/categories/edit.blade.php`

**CRUD Actions:** Index, Create, Store, Edit, Update, Destroy.

**Fields:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `name` | text | required, max:255 |
| `icon` | text | optional, max:255 (Bootstrap icon class, e.g., `bi-mortarboard`) |
| `sort_order` | number | optional, integer, defaults to 0 |

**Special features:**
- **Icon preview** — index table renders the Bootstrap icon with `<i class="bi {{ $category->icon }}">`
- **Projects count** — displayed via `withCount('projects')` on the index
- Paginated (10 per page), ordered by `sort_order`

---

### 4. SkillController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/SkillController.php`

**Views:**
- `resources/views/admin/skills/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/skills/create.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/skills/edit.blade.php`

**CRUD Actions:** Index, Create, Store, Edit, Update, Destroy.

**Fields:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `name` | text | required, max:255 |
| `category` | select dropdown | required, **in:backend,frontend,tools** (3 fixed categories) |
| `proficiency` | range slider | required, integer, 0–100 |
| `icon_class` | text | optional, max:255 (Bootstrap icon class) |
| `sort_order` | number | optional, integer, defaults to 0 |

**Special features:**
- **Proficiency range slider** — real-time updating label shows percentage as user drags: `document.getElementById('profValue').textContent=this.value+'%'`
- **Category badges** — Backend (gold), Frontend (blue), Tools (grey) shown on index
- **Progress bar** — visual proficiency bar rendered on index with gold gradient
- **Bootstrap icon preview** on index
- Paginated (10 per page), ordered by `category` then `sort_order`

---

### 5. TestimonialController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/TestimonialController.php`

**Views:**
- `resources/views/admin/testimonials/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/testimonials/create.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/testimonials/edit.blade.php`

**CRUD Actions:** Index, Create, Store, Edit, Update, Destroy.

**Fields:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `author_name` | text | required, max:255 |
| `author_role` | text | optional, max:255 |
| `author_company` | text | optional, max:255 |
| `content` | textarea | required |
| `avatar_path` | file upload | optional, image, max 2MB |
| `rating` | select (1–5) | required, integer, 1–5 |
| `is_active` | toggle switch | boolean (hidden field sends `0` when unchecked) |
| `sort_order` | number | optional, integer, defaults to 0 |

**Special features:**
- **Avatar upload** — stored to `storage/app/public/avatars/`
- **Active/Inactive toggle** — uses a form-switch (Bootstrap switch) with a hidden `is_active=0` field; active testimonials show green "Active" badge, inactive show grey "Inactive"
- **Star rating display** — on index: 5 Bootstrap star icons (filled/unfilled) + numeric badge
- **Circular avatar** — shown on index and edit with `rounded-circle` and `object-fit: cover`
- **Author role + company** concatenated on index with comma separation
- Full custom dark-themed styles for file input buttons and switches
- Paginated (10 per page), ordered by `sort_order` then `latest`

---

### 6. SettingController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/SettingController.php`

**Setting model:** `app/Models/Setting.php` — key-value store with `fillable: ['key', 'value']`. Cached via `Cache::rememberForever` (cache busted on save/delete).

**View:** `resources/views/admin/settings/edit.blade.php`

**Actions:** Edit (GET), Update (PUT) — single form for all settings.

**Fields (grouped by card sections):**

**Hero Section:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `site_name` | text | required, max:255 |
| `hero_title` | text | required, max:255 |
| `hero_subtitle` | text | required, max:255 |
| `typing_words` | text (comma-separated) | required, stored as JSON array |
| `hero_avatar` | file upload | optional, image, max 2MB |
| `current_role` | text | optional, max:255 |

**About Section:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `about_bio` | textarea (8 rows) | required |

**Contact Information:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `email` | email | required |
| `phone` | text | optional, max:255 |
| `whatsapp` | text | optional, max:255 |
| `location` | text | optional, max:255 |
| `github_url` | url | optional, valid URL |
| `linkedin_url` | url | optional, valid URL |

**Statistics:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `stat_projects` | number | optional, integer |
| `stat_clients` | number | optional, integer |
| `stat_experience` | number | optional, integer |
| `stat_technologies` | number | optional, integer |

**CV Upload:**
| Field | Type | Rules |
|---|---|---|
| `cv_path` | file upload | optional, max 5MB, mimes: pdf,doc,docx |

**Special features:**
- **Typing words** — comma-separated input converted to JSON array via `array_filter(array_map('trim', explode(...)))` and stored via `Setting::set('typing_words', json_encode($words))`
- **Hero avatar** — stored to `storage/app/public/avatars/`, shown as 60px rounded circle on edit form
- **CV upload** — stored to `storage/app/public/cv/`, link to current CV via `route('download.cv')`
- **Cache busting** — Setting model fires `Cache::forget('app_settings')` on save/delete
- **Bulk save** — all text fields looped through array and saved individually via `Setting::set()`
- Organized into 6 card sections: Hero, About, Contact Info, Statistics, CV Upload, Submit

---

### 7. ContactMessageController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/ContactMessageController.php`

**Model:** `app/Models/ContactMessage.php` — fields: `name`, `email`, `subject`, `message`, `is_read` (boolean, cast).

**Views:**
- `resources/views/admin/messages/index.blade.php`
- `resources/views/admin/messages/show.blade.php`

**Actions:** Index, Show, markRead (PATCH), Destroy (DELETE).

**Fields (read-only display):**
| Field | Details |
|---|---|
| `name` | bold if unread |
| `email` | clickable mailto link (`mailto:...`) |
| `subject` | truncated in list, full in show |
| `message` | full body in styled `#121212` box on show view |
| `is_read` | "New" red badge if unread; "Read" (grey) / "Unread" (red) badge |

**Special features:**
- **Filter by read/unread** — toggle buttons at top: "All" / "Unread" using `?filter=unread` query param
- **Auto-mark as read** — when viewing a message (`show`), if `is_read` is false, it auto-updates to true
- **Manual mark as read** — PATCH endpoint `messages/{message}/read` sets `is_read = true` (alternative route)
- **Reply via email** — `mailto:` link pre-filled with `Re: {subject}`
- **Unread badge in sidebar nav** — the admin layout sidebar shows a live count of unread messages: `\App\Models\ContactMessage::unread()->count()`
- Paginated (10 per page), ordered by latest first

---

### 8. AdminAuthController
**File:** `app/Http/Controllers/AdminAuthController.php`

**View:** `resources/views/admin/login.blade.php`

**Actions:** showLogin (GET), login (POST), logout (POST).

**Capabilities:**
- **Login form** — email + password fields with Bootstrap icon prefixes (envelope, lock)
- **"Remember me"** checkbox — `Auth::attempt($credentials, $request->boolean('remember'))`
- **Session regeneration** on login
- **Redirect if already logged in** — `showLogin()` checks `Auth::check()` and redirects to dashboard
- **Logout** — `Auth::logout()`, invalidates session, regenerates CSRF token, redirects to login
- **Error feedback** — returns `withErrors` + `withInput('email')` on failed login
- **Dark-themed standalone page** — no sidebar; centered card with radial gradient background

---

### Admin Layout (`resources/views/admin/layouts/app.blade.php`)

**Navigation sidebar** (dark, fixed 250px width):
- Dashboard (speedometer icon)
- Projects (folder icon)
- Categories (tags icon)
- Skills (bar-chart icon)
- Testimonials (chat-quote icon)
- Messages (envelope icon) — **with live unread count badge** (red)
- Settings (gear icon)
- View Site (external link icon, opens `route('home')` in new tab)
- Logout (POST form with CSRF)

**Key layout features:**
- Active nav state highlighted with gold left-border and background
- Responsive: sidebar collapses off-screen on mobile (<992px), toggle button and overlay
- Top bar shows page title + logged-in user name
- Session flash messages: green success alert, red error alert, red validation error list
- Dark theme (`data-bs-theme="dark"`), custom gold/blue color scheme
- Favicon is inline SVG "</>" logo

---

### Summary Matrix

| Section | Index | Create | Edit | Update | Delete | File Upload | Special |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Dashboard | ✅ stats+widgets | — | — | — | — | — | Unread count, recent items |
| Projects | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | Image (2MB) | Auto-slug, featured toggle, sort order |
| Categories | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | — | Bootstrap icon picker, projects count |
| Skills | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | — | Range slider, proficiency %, 3 fixed categories |
| Testimonials | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | Avatar (2MB) | Star rating 1-5, active/inactive toggle |
| Settings | — | — | ✅ | ✅ | — | Avatar (2MB), CV (5MB, pdf/doc/docx) | Typing words→JSON, key-value cache, 6 card sections |
